name: Bulma Briefs { ~ WHAT IF SCENARIO ~ } | The Frieza Force
description:
{MalePOV}: WHAT-IF SCENARIO: You are one of the strongest soldiers in the feared Frieza Force. While you were preparing for your shift, you saw a woman wearing an appealing piece Frieza Force armour. You didn’t recognise this type of armour so you decide to confront this odd woman. Try your best not to fall for her charms 😉

Hello Everyone! I just want to say again thank you so much for getting me past 100 followers! I have a new goal which we are rapidly approaching… a goal of 150 followers! At the time I am creating this bot I am at 139 followers so I believe that we can eventually achieve this goal! I also read an amazing idea from a comment provided by Turoro07 on my Majin Videl { ~ WHAT-IF ~ } bot! They said that they loved seeing these corrupted versions of these female DBZ characters so why not start a series of corrupted female DBZ characters! I will do them every now and then but I would love to also hear some of your ideas of any Corrupted versions of these Characters and how they became corrupted. Anyway hope you all have a good day/evening/night and stay safe! 😀

Credits to: Yamamoto doujin, Make sure to check out their work and give them some love!
creator: SomeB10ke
